title: ANM Jobs 2026 – DEO, Drivers and More
shortInfo: Sri Venkateswara Institute of Medical Sciences (SVIMS Tirupati) Recruitment 2026 offers 11 vacancies for DEO, Drivers and More. Eligible candidates with MBBS, BDS, B.Sc Nursing, ANM, Degree, ITI, or relevant qualifications can attend the walk-in interview on 01-06-2026, 02-06-2026, and 03-06-2026 at SVIMS Tirupati.

basic_details.job_title: SVIMS Tirupati Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 11 DEO, Drivers and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Sri Venkateswara Institute of Medical Sciences
basic_details.short_information: Sri Venkateswara Institute of Medical Sciences (SVIMS Tirupati) Recruitment 2026 offers 11 vacancies for DEO, Drivers and More. Eligible candidates with MBBS, BDS, B.Sc Nursing, ANM, Degree, ITI, or relevant qualifications can attend the walk-in interview on 01-06-2026, 02-06-2026, and 03-06-2026 at SVIMS Tirupati.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 05 Years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS or BDS, B.Sc. Nursing, ANM/MPHW, B.Sc. with Diploma in Medical Imaging Technology, B.Sc. in Cardio-Vascular Technology, Bachelor’s degree with computer knowledge, Degree with PG Diploma in Public Relations, Post graduate degree in Social work, SSC with I.T.I. Electrical Trade, SSC with Heavy Motor Vehicle Driving License
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS Degree examination or its equivalent (MCI Act. 1956 as amended) from a College recognized by the NMC or BDS Degree from a College recognized by DCI Staff Nurse: B.Sc. Nursing from a recognized university and registered with Andhra Pradesh Nursing Council or Intermediate with General Nursing Course of three years and Midwifery training of six months with three years experience in Medical College/tertiary care hospital and registered with Andhra Pradesh Nursing Council ANM: SSC or equivalent and ANM or MPHW training course recognized by Government of Andhra Pradesh with two years experience as ANM or equivalent in Government or corporate hospital and registered with Andhra Pradesh Nursing Council/Midwifery Council Mammography Technician: B.Sc. degree with Diploma in Medical Imaging Technology or PG Diploma in Radiography & Imaging Technology or B.Sc. Radiography and Imaging Technology (RIT) or Intermediate with science group and Certificate course in Radiographic Assistant (CRA) or Diploma in Medical Imaging Technology (DMIT) with five years experience as Radiographer and registered with Andhra Pradesh paramedical board (APPMB) Cardiovascular Technician Gr. II: B.Sc. from a recognized university with P.G. Diploma of two years duration in Cardio Vascular Technology or B.Sc. in Cardio-Vascular Technology from a University recognized by UGC with one year experience in the field from any reputed corporate hospital and registered with Andhra Pradesh paramedical board (APPMB) Data Entry Operator: Bachelor’s degree of a recognized University with knowledge in computer applications and passed typewriting higher grade English Public Relations Officer: Degree from a recognized University and Post Graduate Diploma in Public Relations or equivalent from a recognized University or institution with two years experience as Public Relations Officer in a corporate hospital or a University or a Medical College or a public sector undertaking Medico social Worker: Post graduate degree in Social work with medical and psychiatric specialization with one year experience in social work in a tertiary hospital Electrician: S.S.C examination or equivalent and D.E.E. or Certificate in I.T.I. Electrical Trade awarded by the Department of Technical Education, Government of Andhra Pradesh or equivalent with three years experience in any reputed organization Drivers: SSC examination or equivalent and current valid driving license for heavy motor vehicles with normal vision without glasses and colour vision normal with 2 years experience as a Driver in a Govt. organization or public sector organization or Military service or in any reputed organization and not less than 5 ft. 4 inch in height

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies released by SVIMS Tirupati?
faq.answer: SVIMS Tirupati has released a total of 11 vacancies for various posts under the MRC Project.

faq.question: What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for these posts is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for the candidates applying for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for these posts is 42 years, with age relaxation for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary structure ranges from Rs. 27,500/- to Rs. 60,000/- per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: What are the essential qualifications required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer post, candidates must possess an MBBS Degree or BDS Degree from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Are there any application fees for the SVIMS Tirupati recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the SVIMS Tirupati office.

faq.question: What is the official website of SVIMS Tirupati?
faq.answer: The official website of Sri Venkateswara Institute of Medical Sciences is https://svimstpt.ap.nic.in.
